{{Infobox character
| name = Bishop of the Iron Legion
| aliases = Bishops, Bishop
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|breaking barriers, forms faces out of walls, clawed hands that erupt from walls}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Bishop of the Iron Legion]]}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Iron Legion]]}}
| residence = {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Iron Legion Hives}}
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Captain (novel)|The Captain]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|A Bishop is a specialized consciousness created by the [[Iron Legion]]. These entities serve as the awakened minds of specific [[Hives]], which are often designated for unique purposes. While they function as managers for these [[Hives]], they are integrated into the structure of the [[Hive]] itself. This integration allows them to manifest physical features from the surrounding walls, such as clawed hands or a large face used for communication. A Bishop's facial features may consist of various components, including clusters of cameras or groups of living eyeballs. Bishops are highly intelligent and capable combatants. They can adapt to an opponent's magical specialties by developing countermeasures and possess the ability to unravel complex spell anchors if given sufficient time. In a combat scenario, they may work alongside Shepherds and an army of [[Pawns]] to overwhelm enemies. Within the broader hierarchy of the [[Iron Legion]], Bishops typically act as controllers that focus on maintaining and expanding the [[Legion]]'s presence across life-supporting planets in [[Dark Space]], rather than attempting to conquer civilized territories.}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The Bishop of the [[Iron Legion]] is an awakened consciousness that serves as the governing entity for the [[Iron Legion]]. This consciousness is bound to manage specific [[Iron Legion]] [[Hives]], with which it remains fully integrated. To interact with its environment, the Bishop forms faces out of walls and utilizes clawed hands that erupt from these surfaces. Furthermore, the entity possesses the specialized capability to break through barriers.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Bishop of the Iron Legion]] is a consciousness bound to manage certain [[Iron Legion]] [[Hives]] that forms faces out of walls.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c3">''The Captain'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|A Bishop is the awakened consciousness of a [[Hive]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c17">''The Captain'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The Bishop is an entity capable of breaking barriers.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c18">''The Captain'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The Bishop is integrated with the [[Hive]] and has clawed hands that erupt from walls.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Bishops control the [[Iron Legion]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c28">''The Captain'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Knight ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|A Bishop can control a [[Hive]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c35">''The Knight'', chapter 35</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
[[Category:Iron Legion]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
